title: Add bounds checking to snprintf in coap_config.c and coap_keys.c
description: Follow the established pattern from routes/ for return value checks on snprintf to prevent truncation.
close_reason: Added snprintf return value bounds checks following routes pattern in coap_config.c:eui64_to_hex, coap_config.c:encode_radio and coap_keys.c:encode_iso8601_timestamp. Committed as a4b2d1cd1
